stories.title: User can input workout history
stories.description: As a user, I want to input my workout history so that the AI fitness trainer can adapt to my progress.
acceptance_criteria: User can input workout type (e.g., running, weightlifting)
User can input workout duration and intensity

stories.title: AI fitness trainer adapts to injuries
stories.description: As a user, I want the AI fitness trainer to adapt to my injuries so that I can recover safely and effectively.
acceptance_criteria: AI fitness trainer takes into account user's injury history
AI fitness trainer generates modified workout plans based on user's injuries
AI fitness trainer provides injury prevention tips and advice

stories.title: AI fitness trainer adapts to travels
stories.description: As a user, I want the AI fitness trainer to adapt to my travels so that I can stay fit and healthy on the go.
acceptance_criteria: AI fitness trainer takes into account user's travel schedule and location
AI fitness trainer generates workout plans that can be completed in different environments (e.g., hotel gym, outdoor)
AI fitness trainer provides travel-friendly workout tips and advice

stories.title: User receives personalized workout recommendations
stories.description: As a user, I want to receive personalized workout recommendations so that I can achieve my fitness goals.
acceptance_criteria: AI fitness trainer generates workout recommendations based on user's fitness level and goals
AI fitness trainer takes into account user's workout history and progress
AI fitness trainer provides detailed workout plans with instructions and videos

stories.title: User can track progress and achievements
stories.description: As a user, I want to track my progress and achievements so that I can stay motivated and engaged.
acceptance_criteria: User can view workout history and progress
User can set and track fitness goals
User can receive rewards and badges for achievements

system_design.architecture_summary: Microservices-based system architecture with RESTful APIs for scalability and maintainability.

components.name: User Service
components.description: Handles user authentication, injury input, and travel plans.

components.name: Fitness Service
components.description: Provides personalized workout recommendations, injury prevention, and recovery workouts.

components.name: Workout Service
components.description: Generates adapted workouts based on user input and travel plans.

components.name: Database Service
components.description: Stores user data, workout plans, and injury information.

components.name: Notification Service
components.description: Sends personalized recommendations and notifications to users.

data_flow.description: User input and travel plans are sent to the Fitness Service for workout adaptation.
Workout recommendations are sent to the Workout Service for generation.
Generated workouts are stored in the Database Service.
Workout plans and injury information are sent to the Notification Service for personalized recommendations.
Personalized recommendations are sent back to the User Service for user notification.

files.code:
from pydantic import BaseModel

class User(BaseModel):
    user_id: int
    name: str
    email: str

    def __str__(self):
        return f'User(user_id={self.user_id}, name={self.name}, email={self.email})'

class Workout(BaseModel):
    workout_id: int
    user_id: int
    exercise: str
    sets: int
    reps: int

    def __str__(self):
        return f'Workout(workout_id={self.workout_id}, user_id={self.user_id}, exercise={self.exercise}, sets={self.sets}, reps={self.reps})'

class Progress(BaseModel):
    progress_id: int
    user_id: int
    workout_id: int
    date: str
    weight: float

    def __str__(self):
        return f'Progress(progress_id={self.progress_id}, user_id={self.user_id}, workout_id={self.workout_id}, date={self.date}, weight={self.weight})'

import pytest
from models import User, Workout, Progress

class TestModels:
    def test_user_init(self):
        user = User(user_id='1', name='John Doe', email='john@example.com')
        assert user.user_id == '1'
        assert user.name == 'John Doe'
        assert user.email == 'john@example.com'

    def test_workout_init(self):
        workout = Workout(user_id='1', workout_name='Workout 1', description='This is a workout')
        assert workout.user_id == '1'
        assert workout.workout_name == 'Workout 1'
        assert workout.description == 'This is a workout'

    def test_progress_init(self):
        progress = Progress(user_id='1', progress='Progress 1')
        assert progress.user_id == '1'
        assert progress.progress == 'Progress 1'

FROM python:3.10-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN pip install -r requirements.txt
CMD ["uvicorn","api:app","--host","0.0.0.0","--port","8000"]

version: '3'
services:
  app:
    build: .
    ports:
      - "8000:8000"
    environment:
      - ENVIRONMENT=production
